title: Create: Computing
description: [FORGE] An addon for Create that adds ComputerCraft "integration" in form of peripheral blocks and more.
body:
Create: Computing

Blocks

 

Computerized Display Source

Allows you to directly output text from a computer to any Create compatible display target.

 

Computerized Display Target

Allows you to receive output from any Create compatible display source.

 

Computerized Redstone Link

Allows you to send/receive signals on multiple "frequencies" in the Redstone Link network, from a computer, of course.
Has configurable options on banning certain "frequencies" (items) and the maximum amount of concurrent handles.

Train Network Observer

Allows you to access data about the Train Network, currently we have:

  • A rudimentary summary of all train tracks (the graph)
  • The location, speed and schedule of any trains in the connected network.
  • The location and state of any signals in the network.
  • The location and filter of any observer in the network.
  • The location and expected arrival times for incoming trains of any station in the network.

    If you have any suggestions, feel free to create issues on the GitHub or contact me on Discord (Sascha_T#3993)
